- animal type: cat
- fur pattern: tabby/striped
- fur texture: long/fluffy
- eye color: yellow/amber
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = cat] THEN [20]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = white] THEN [29]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = brown/white/black] THEN [28]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur pattern = spotted/brown/white] THEN [13]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule "IF [animal type = cat] THEN [20]" fires because the Query Image depicts a cat with long, fluffy, tabby-patterned fur.
</rule_check>

<response>20</response>
